source_rationale: RGS5 is a canonical marker of pericytes and vascular mural cells
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a hallmark of pericytes and smooth muscle cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte marker involved in cytoskeletal organization
PDGFRB is a key receptor tyrosine kinase defining pericytes and mural cells
NOTCH3 is a signaling receptor highly expressed in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
MYH11 (smooth muscle myosin heavy chain) marks contractile smooth muscle/pericyte identity
MCAM (CD146) is a cell adhesion molecule expressed on pericytes
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells and pericytes regulating calcium signaling
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
GJA4 (connexin 37) is a gap junction protein expressed in vascular mural cells
CD3D is a core component of the T cell receptor complex, defining T lymphocytes
CD8A marks cytotoxic T lymphocytes
Granzyme K is characteristic of effector memory CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by activated/effector T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in effector T and NK cells
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CD2 is a T cell surface glycoprotein involved in T cell activation
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker confirming immune cell identity
Interferon gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is produced by activated T cells and NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic T and NK cells
Perforin is a cytolytic protein essential for cytotoxic T cell killing
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a key receptor marking fibroblasts and mesenchymal stromal cells
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene produced by fibroblasts
Collagen type I alpha 2 is a fibroblast-produced structural collagen
Complement C1s is produced by stromal fibroblasts in the ovary
FOXL2 is a transcription factor essential for ovarian granulosa/theca-interstitial cell identity
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian stromal/theca cells
StAR (steroidogenic acute regulatory protein) indicates steroidogenic stromal cells
Osteoglycin is a proteoglycan enriched in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
SERPINF1 (PEDF) is secreted by stromal fibroblasts
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine produced by stromal cells in the ovary
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to vascular endothelial cells
VE-cadherin (CDH5) is an endothelial-specific adherens junction protein
CD34 is a sialomucin expressed on vascular endothelial cells
KDR (VEGFR2) is the primary VEGF receptor on endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor involved in vascular development
Endomucin is a sialomucin expressed on vascular endothelial cells
FLT1 (VEGFR1) is a VEGF receptor specific to endothelial cells
ROBO4 is an endothelial-specific guidance receptor
SOX18 is a transcription factor regulating endothelial cell differentiation
ESAM is an endothelial cell-selective adhesion molecule
Anti-Müllerian hormone is produced by granulosa cells of growing ovarian follicles
FOXL2 is a master transcription factor for granulosa cell identity and differentiation
Inhibin alpha is a TGF-beta family member produced by granulosa cells
17β-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase type 1 is a steroidogenic enzyme in granulosa cells
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells
WFDC2 (HE4) is expressed in ovarian granulosa and epithelial cells
Desmoplakin marks epithelial cell junctions in granulosa cells
AMH receptor type 2 is specifically expressed on granulosa cells
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is highly expressed in granulosa cells
EMX2 is a transcription factor involved in ovarian/reproductive tract development
Glutathione S-transferase alpha 1 is enriched in granulosa cells
WT1 is a transcription factor expressed in granulosa cells of the ovary
CD14 is a monocyte/macrophage lineage marker
Complement C1q subunit A is highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
Lysozyme is a classic myeloid/macrophage marker
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein in myeloid immune signaling
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/microglia marker
Fc epsilon receptor gamma is expressed on myeloid cells including macrophages
MHC class II expression indicates antigen-presenting myeloid cells
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein characteristic of macrophages
FCER1A marks mast cells and dendritic cells, suggesting a mixed myeloid/immune cluster
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine produced by activated macrophages
IL-1β is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by activated macrophages
SPI1 (PU.1) is a master transcription factor for myeloid cell differentiation
CD163 is a scavenger receptor specific to tissue-resident macrophages
Complement C1q is highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
LYVE1 marks tissue-resident perivascular macrophages
Folate receptor beta marks tissue-resident anti-inflammatory macrophages
Mannose receptor family member marks M2-like tissue-resident macrophages
CSF1R (CD115) is the macrophage colony-stimulating factor receptor
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor on tissue-resident macrophages
Coagulation factor XIII A marks tissue-resident macrophages
Macrophage scavenger receptor 1 (CD204) is a tissue macrophage marker
MAFB is a transcription factor driving macrophage differentiation
DAB2 is an endocytic adaptor enriched in tissue-resident macrophages
MS4A6A is a membrane-spanning protein enriched in macrophages
Zona pellucida glycoprotein 3 is an oocyte-specific gene
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene marking oocytes
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
SYCP3 is a synaptonemal complex protein expressed in meiotic oocytes
LHX8 is a transcription factor essential for oocyte development
SOHLH2 is a germ cell-specific transcription factor required for oogenesis
TUBB8 is an oocyte-specific beta-tubulin essential for meiotic spindle formation
KPNA7 is an oocyte-enriched importin involved in nuclear transport during oogenesis
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein essential for early embryogenesis
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit expressed in oocytes
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte/vascular mural cell marker
Alpha smooth muscle actin marks pericytes and smooth muscle cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte cytoskeletal marker
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain marks contractile mural cells
NOTCH3 signaling receptor is characteristic of pericytes
PDGFRB defines pericytes and vascular mural cells
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker
Calponin 1 is a smooth muscle-specific contractile protein suggesting more mature smooth muscle identity
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle/pericyte cells
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
Decorin is a hallmark proteoglycan of stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA marks fibroblasts and mesenchymal stromal cells
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major fibroblast-produced matrix protein
Osteoglycin is enriched in ovarian stromal fibroblasts
TCF21 is a transcription factor marking ovarian theca/stromal cells
StAR indicates steroidogenic activity in theca-interstitial stromal cells
Claudin-11 is expressed in ovarian stromal cells
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor enriched in ovarian stromal cells
Complement factor D (adipsin) is expressed in ovarian stromal/theca cells
Lumican is a proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts and stromal cells
APOE is expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in lipid metabolism
